---
title: Thoughts on Decentralization
author: RandomPeerA
date: 2024-02-27
description: Why decentralized systems are worth the complexity
tags: ["#decentralization", "#philosophy"]
---
Why decentralized systems are worth the complexity. The answer is resilience and self-sovereignty.

When you own your data and your infrastructure, no single entity can shut you down, censor you, or lock you out.
